metadata.title: José Arthur | Full-Stack Developer
metadata.description: Personal portfolio of José Arthur, Brazilian full-stack developer, UI designer, and AI enthusiast.

hero.name: I'm
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer · UI Designer · AI Enthusiast
hero.bio:
I build digital products with purpose, from idea to deploy.
Passionate about clean code, intelligent automation, and experiences that truly make sense for their users.

about.label: about me
about.title: Who am I?
about.photoAlt: José Arthur working at his home office
about.bio:
I'm 23 years old, and technology has always been the medium I chose to build something that matters. I'm a full-stack developer and I create products end to end — from robust back ends to interfaces people genuinely enjoy using — with a focus on performance, usability, and clean code.

More than writing code, what drives me is turning knowledge into systems that create real value for people. I love building things that help, that teach, and that leave everything a little better than it was. AI is a heavy part of my workflow (I use Claude every day) to speed up from architecture to delivery, without ever compromising on quality.

I'm always building: AetherScroll, AetherLink, Prototype A01, and other ideas are born from this urge to experiment and solve real problems. Soon I'll be in Calgary, Canada, expanding horizons while bringing my stack — and my plans — along with me.

mantra.label: my mindset
mantra.text: To me, this means delivering flawless results that genuinely add value to people — not just to me. Discipline gives me routine and helps me take care of myself; focus keeps me on the right goals; consistency stops me from dropping what I've already started; and execution is what turns an idea into reality. Because theory without execution changes nothing.
mantra.quote: Turning knowledge into systems that generate value, freedom, and legacy.
mantra.signature: Architect of ecosystems · Conductor of aether · Forger of legacies.

games.title: Games
games.desc: Fascinated by the world of games, especially single-player ones and the stories only they can tell.

tabletop.title: Board & card games
tabletop.desc: A passion of its own: strategy, a full table, and good company around it.

reading.title: Reading
reading.desc: Books, manga, and comics — the right fuel for imagination in my free time.

movement.title: Walking & cycling
movement.desc: I wander with no destination to reconnect with myself and reflect along the way.

animals.title: Animal world
animals.desc: Curious by nature: I love learning about sharks, crocodiles, snakes, lions, and the like.

writing.title: Writing
writing.desc: I'm always writing — especially the fantasy stories of my own universe.

loves: Movies, series, and anime to recharge
Good music playing while I code
Watching my projects come to life just as I imagined
avoids: Dry code, with no hierarchy or comments
Borrowed opinions and prejudice without even trying first

aetherscroll.name: AetherScroll
aetherscroll.desc: Immersive reading and navigation platform with a fluid, minimalist experience for digital content consumption.

aetherlink.name: AetherLink
aetherlink.desc: Smart link shortener and manager with integrated analytics and advanced URL customization.

sinfonia.name: Sinfonia da Alma
sinfonia.desc: Mentorship website with a headless CMS, blog, and dynamic landing pages for personal development journeys.

a01.name: Prototype A01
a01.desc: Experimental WhatsApp assistant designed for conversational automation, useful replies, and smart flows.

contact.label: contact
contact.title: Let's talk?
